title: HK-47 — Assassin Droid Companion
chunkText: HK-47 is an assassin droid companion in KOTOR 1 and 2. Built by Revan himself, HK-47 is famous for his darkly comic sarcastic personality and his habit of calling organics 'meatbags'. He opens every request with 'Query:' and refers to killing as 'cleansing'. He is enthusiastic about violence and assassination. HK-47 is beloved as one of the most memorable video game companions ever created. In KOTOR 2, he is found disassembled and must be repaired by the Exile.
